generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and duty, I'm glad to see our leaders pushing for strategic autonomy. It's not about isolation—it's about ensuring our allies can rely on us when it counts. Remember the chaos during the 2020 supply chain disruptions? We can't afford to be vulnerable again. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
